taxonomy: Effusiella ephemera is a genus of lichens in the family Pannariaceae. Effusiella ephemera is often classified within the suborder Pannarineae. It is a type of crustose lichen, characterized by its thin, crust-like thallus. The classification of Effusiella ephemera is further divided based on its specific morphology and chemical composition. Further research may be necessary to determine the precise classification of this species.
